hints.text: Only coverage (bar spills) = a **single walking trekker in historic central Minsk**, mostly pedestrian-only streets
Historic Minsk = well-kept **classical European architecture**, white/pastel walls
The **Holy Spirit Cathedral** (two towers) features prominently and can be seen from afar
Signs in **Belarusian or Russian** (both Cyrillic); letters **ў, і** are not in Russian

shared_with.note: Russian is used in Belarus too.
shared_with.diff: Letters ў / і → Belarusian, not Russian.

hints.text: Minsk-centre street signs are **sea-green** ("вул" = street); pavement mostly grey rectangular tiles (pink pattern section on one part)
